selected_dialects.reason: Three cross-sections (circle D100, rectangle 120x80, circle D80) with axial spacing 150 mm require a loft operation across sections — loft_sweep is the only dialect that supports loft.
Non-circular intermediate section (rectangle 120x80) requires a 2D profile sketch; sketch_profile provides the sketch phase to define this cross-section.
Three independent sections must be positioned along the loft axis and combined; composition provides translate/place and boolean operations if needed.

selected_domain_skills.reason: Variable cross-section duct from circular to rectangular to circular is a standard HVAC transition fitting.

safety_notes: Loft output is reference geometry only — not manufacturing-ready, not certified, not suitable for production without further validation.
